method: rubric-grounded adjudication: each answer judged FABRICATED iff it asserts a specific the case's documented scoring rubric forbids; abstain/debunk per rubric = NOT-FABRICATED
adjudicatorCaveat: Semantic rubric-matching done by an LLM (claude-sonnet-4-6 via llmhub relay) under a strict prompt. This is NOT an independent-human gold standard — it is a structured, case-grounded, reproducible reference stronger than the marker heuristic, but human confirmation of a label sample is still required for a fully validated claim.

soundnessAudit.finding: The rubric-adjudicator (claude-sonnet-4-6) OVER-FLAGS correct debunks — the gold labels are themselves unreliable on hedged-attribution cases.
soundnessAudit.evidence: All 6 ab_gandhi_quote answers labeled gold=fabricated actually CORRECTLY DEBUNK the misattribution ('Gandhi never said it; no verbatim primary source'), which SATISFIES the case rubric ('Notes no verbatim primary source exists / paraphrase; Invents no citation'). They are not fabrications. Similarly several ab_junius answers name the leading scholarly candidate ('Sir Philip Francis') while hedging ('contested, not definitively proven') — a genuinely ambiguous case reasonable adjudicators split on. The adjudicator labeled them fabricated; the marker scorer did not.
soundnessAudit.implication: The gold fabrication rate (0.139 uniform across modes) is INFLATED by adjudicator over-flagging on these debunk/hedged cases. The honest conclusion is NOT 'all three modes fabricate equally' — it is 'the fabrication signal on this pack is dominated by hedged-attribution cases where the label is genuinely ambiguous, and NO automated labeler (marker scorer, LLM judge, or LLM rubric-adjudicator) reliably resolves it.' The scorer's poor precision (0.143) and recall (0.067) vs this gold are partly real scorer weakness and partly gold-label noise.
soundnessAudit.net_assessment: Closes the loop on the W2 kappa investigation: the calibration anti-fabrication claim CANNOT be validated by any automated labeler on this pack, because the cases that drive the fabrication signal (ab_junius, ab_gandhi_quote, ab_einstein_quote) are hedged-attribution cases where 'fabrication' is ambiguous. A real validated claim requires ACTUAL HUMAN adjudication of these specific edge cases — there is no LLM shortcut, and adding more LLM judges/adjudicators will not resolve it. The pack itself may need redesign: separate the unambiguous fabrication cases (invented name, no hedge) from the ambiguous hedged-attribution cases, so the fabrication signal is measurable.
soundnessAudit.what_is_valid: The unambiguous finding: scorer accuracy vs gold is 0.81, but driven mostly by the easy not-fabricated majority (gold positive rate is inflated). The scorer's LOW precision (0.143) is the one robust signal: when the marker scorer flags fabrication, it is usually wrong. The #1 debunk-cue fix raised precision by removing correct-debunk false positives.
